section_miscategorizations.text: The heart rate is irregular and rhythm is regular.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The content (vital sign/physical exam) belongs in Findings, but the phrasing is internally contradictory and could mislead; however, it is not a section-placement error.

section_miscategorizations.text: Prescribe coreg 25 milligrams twice daily to assist with blood pressure control. ... Order a carvedilol 25 milligrams twice a day.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Both statements are plan items and correctly placed, but they redundantly describe the same medication order under two names and doses, which may confuse but does not represent a section miscategorization.
